---
title: "VitalLaw - Blue Chip Publications"
page-layout: article
---

# VitalLaw - Blue Chip Publications

## Description

Economic forecasting resource providing Blue Chip consensus forecasts and archived indicators in Excel and PDF formats. Supports macroeconomic, financial, and forecasting research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics, Historical Archives

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address for access.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-blue-chip-economic-indicators?app=yalesites)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
